title: AFRIMA Launches Diamond Showcase Portal, Invites Rising Stars to Apply - FinancialEDGE
description: The journey to discover and celebrate Africa’s future music stars has begun, as the 9th Edition of the All Africa Music Awards (AFRIMA) has opened the application portal for its Diamond Showcase, the award institution's platform for rising music talents. The 9th AFRIMA Diamond Showcase is designed to give undiscovered African artists a real chance
html: The journey to discover and celebrate Africa’s future music stars has begun, as the 9th Edition of the All Africa Music Awards (AFRIMA) has opened the application portal for its Diamond Showcase, the award institution’s platform for rising music talents.
